REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT STERLING BANK AND TRUST, F.S.B., REDWOOD TRUST DEED SERVICES INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER COMPELLING RESPONSES TO INTERROGATORIES, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED. calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2018 Set For Trial On Sep-24-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories, Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-09-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STERLING BANK AND TRUST, F.S.B., REDWOOD TRUST DEED SERVICES INC.'s Motion For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories, Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions is
GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to provide complete verified responses to Form Interrogatories and Request for Production without objections within 30 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $817.50. All future discovery motions to be calendared in department 301 at 9:00 a.m. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: R. Wong, Not reported (D501)
